_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

include_faction_challenges.description: Include faction-based checks such as 'Complete a game with 5 Mutants' or 'Win a game with all Avengers'.

include_map_challenges.description: Include map-specific checks such as 'Play a match on Yggsgard: Royal Palace' or 'Play on Hellfire Gala as a Mutant'.

include_gamemode_challenges.description: Include specific game mode checks such as winning a Domination, Convoy, Convergence, or Clash match. Quick Match checks are always included.

include_achievement_challenges.description: Include long-term achievement checks such as 'Win 50 total matches', 'Win 100 total matches', and 'Win as every character'.

include_extended_character_challenges.description: Include extended per-character checks such as 'Win 3/5 games as X', '10 elims as X', 'Absorb 10k dmg as X', 'Heal 10k HP as X', and 'Use X's Ultimate Ability'.

include_blood_hunt.description: Include the Blood Hunt PvE co-op mode checks in the randomizer.

blood_hunt_max_difficulty.description: The highest Blood Hunt difficulty to include as checks. Each level includes all lower difficulties (e.g. Hard includes Normal + Hard).
